original_image_tags: handwritten initials or signatures in blue ink over the "TO", "FROM", and right-hand routing box areas. A handwritten note in the top left corner appears to read "final".

elements.description: A typed United States Government Memorandum form dated 5/16/69, containing typed text regarding an individual named Forrest E. Wood and flying objects, along with handwritten annotations, signatures, and routing stamps.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same visual content: handwritten annotations (initials/signatures), routing stamps, and a typed memo form, with no contradictions on object counts, categories, or quoted text.
